    Questions

    We're Here To Help

    Need help with registration, packet pickup, or race-day details? Reach out anytime.

    Call Us

    (614) 545-2268

    Email Us

    Event Info

    See race details, distance options, and registration links.

    FAQ

    Can I register online?

    Yes. Registration is available through RunSignUp and opens in a new tab from our Register buttons.

    Can someone else pick up my packet?

    Yes. A friend or family member may pick up your race packet if you cannot attend.

    What time does the race start?

    Main event starts at 9:00 AM on Thanksgiving Day, with Tot Trot at 8:30 AM.

    Address

    Shops on Lane Avenue,
    1675 W Lane Ave,
    Columbus, OH 43221

    Race day tips.

    Packet pickup: Race morning details posted before event week.

    Start times: Tot Trot 8:30am, main event 9:00am.
